storyboard.content: I have been getting strange pins and needles sensations in my hands and feet, especially in the mornings, and they do not go away quickly like normal
My grip strength feels weaker and I have been dropping things without meaning to
The sensation is worse in my right hand compared to my left
This has been gradually getting worse over the past 3 months
It is noticeable but not severely limiting my daily life, though I am worried about tasks at work that require fine motor skills
The tingling is particularly bad in the mornings and does not clear up the way a normal foot falling asleep does
